title: American Boy: A Profile of Steven Prince
original_title: American Boy: A Profile of Steven Prince
overview: Martin Scorsese spends an evening with larger-than-life raconteur Steven Prince—a former drug addict, road manager for Neil Diamond, and actor—as he recounts stories from his colorful life.
